message:
fix: Improve deploy version detection and graceful shutdown

- GetRemoteVersion now uses findBinaryPath to check all locations
  (fixes unnecessary re-uploads when binary is in ~/bin instead of /usr/local/bin)
- multi.go Stop() now waits for pollLoop to finish (graceful shutdown)
- agent.go pollLoop now properly closes doneCh on exit (consistency)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
